description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring a two-story main building with a flat roof and clean, rectangular lines. The property includes a detached single-story structure, likely a garage or pavilion, and a large cylindrical water tank adjacent to a green lawn. The driveway accommodates two parked cars and leads to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch. The backyard area features a swing set, suggesting a family-oriented environment, and the entire property is bordered by a mix of paved and grassy surfaces. The exterior is predominantly white and gray, with some blue and red accents from the vehicles and water tank.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, detached garage, water tank, driveway, and backyard swing set, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, detached garage, water tank, and the full length of the driveway and lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard swing set, water tank, and the back of the house and garage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main house, two parked cars, detached garage, and water tank in a linear arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and the approach to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, flat overhang, and a single door, accessed via a paved driveway.
